PMCRO Docs
Table of Contents

Interface IMcpToolExecutor

Namespace
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.Mcp
Assembly
ProjectName.OrchestrationApi.dll

I AM the IMcpToolExecutor. I define the contract for TYPE 1 (mutative) tool dispatch via the Orchestrator gate. TYPE 2 (read-only) calls are handled natively by MAF's agentic tool loop.

public interface IMcpToolExecutor

Methods

ExecuteType1Async(McpDispatchDecision, CancellationToken)

Executes a mutative (TYPE 1) tool call from a validated Maker dispatch decision. Must only be called after Orchestrator gate approval — never from phase agents directly.
